package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for multiple_error_envelope_shapes_same_api_module: Endpoints in the same API surface that serialize unrelated error payload structures.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule101NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule101NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule101NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario101Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule101NegativeService, input Rule101NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
